findings.issue: Project Knowledge files (architecture.md, patterns.md) not found. Cannot verify directory structure and naming pattern compliance.
findings.fix: Create .claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md and patterns.md if the project has established conventions. Otherwise safe to ignore.

findings.issue: Audit Wave tasks (8, 9, 10) and Final Wave task (11) missing 'Files to modify' and 'Files to read' fields.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' listing all files created/modified by this feature. Audit and QA tasks typically don't modify files, so 'Files to modify' can be listed as the audit report path.

summary: Wave conflict from iteration 1 is resolved. Wave 1 tasks (1-4) modify different files and have no inter-dependencies. Wave 2 tasks (5-7) correctly depend on Wave 1 outputs (style-profiles.md, designer-experience.md) and also modify different files with no conflicts. All skills match the catalog (skill-master, code-reviewing, security-auditor, test-master, pre-deploy-qa). All reviewers are valid (skill-checker exists as agent). 11 tasks total, under 15 limit. No time-based estimates. No critical or major findings. Approved.
